prompt:
Goal: Create a premium, highly believable deluxe hobby board game box front for an imaginary tabletop strategy game called LANTERN MARKET, designed to look like a real collectible product on a store shelf.

Canvas: Landscape board game box front in a realistic 3D product mockup, shown at a slight angle so the left spine is visible. The box sits on a dark wooden tabletop with a softly blurred warm background of shelves and lights. Use a deep midnight blue and black box base with ornate metallic gold trim, embossed borders, and premium printing effects.

Main artwork: A cinematic fantasy East Asian lantern market at dusk/night, packed with glowing paper lanterns, market stalls, merchant boats, bridges, tiled rooftops, pagodas, reflective canal water, tiny shoppers, and warm orange-gold light against a blue evening sky. The scene should feel strategic, elegant, bustling, and magical but grounded, with highly detailed painterly realism.

Front cover typography: Place a small tagline at the top center reading Build. Trade. Illuminate.. Center the large embossed gold serif title LANTERN MARKET across the upper-middle of the box. Beneath it, add a dark green ribbon subtitle reading A GAME OF TRADE, BEAUTY & INFLUENCE. Use refined fantasy board-game typography, beveling, gold foil highlights, and subtle shadows.

Left information column: Add exactly 4 stacked player-info badges in a vertical teal panel with gold line art icons and text: 1) people icon, "2–4 PLAYERS"; 2) clock icon, "60–100 MINUTES"; 3) clover/complexity icon, "MEDIUM COMPLEXITY"; 4) age label, "AGES 12+".

Right feature column: Add exactly 3 stacked premium feature badges in ornate gold-outlined frames: 1) "DELUXE EDITION"; 2) "PREMIUM COMPONENTS"; 3) "BEAUTIFUL WORLD".

Bottom section: Add a central banner reading "FOUR MERCHANT HOUSES. ENDLESS POSSIBILITIES." Under it, show exactly 4 merchant-house panels with distinct colored crests and labels: 1) green crest, "HOUSE AO", "SILK & PAPER"; 2) burgundy crest, "HOUSE KIRI", "SPICES & TEA"; 3) navy crest, "HOUSE MIN", "RIVER CHARMS"; 4) purple crest, "HOUSE SHEN", "NIGHT-BLOOM". On the lower right, add a component preview box titled "RICH COMPONENTS" showing exactly 5 component groups: three colored lantern miniatures, wooden pieces, metal coins, custom cards, and small token tiles; include the caption "WOODEN PIECES • METAL COINS • CUSTOM CARDS".

Publisher and spine: Bottom-left publisher mark reads WILLOWDALE GAMES with a small gold tree emblem. The visible left spine should repeat the game title vertically in gold, include a large lantern icon near the top, ornate gold corner filigree, and a small subtitle line.

Visual style: Ultra-detailed realistic product photography mixed with premium illustrated board game cover art, warm lantern glow, gold foil embossing, crisp readable packaging text, ornate Art Nouveau and East Asian-inspired borders, shelf-worthy deluxe Eurogame aesthetic.

Constraints: Make the box look physically real with thickness, perspective, shadows, glossy highlights, and slight edge wear. Keep all listed text legible and correctly spelled. Do not add extra logos, barcodes, awards, watermarks, or unrelated text.
